name: che-apple-mail-mcp
description: Apple Mail MCP server — 44+ tools, reply-as-draft + IDD task enforcement + NSQL confirmation + .claude/.mail/ namespace (shell v2.10.0, binary v2.4.0)。Shell v2.10.0: 通知 binary v2.4.0 新增 reply_email 的 cc_additional / attachments / save_as_draft optional params (issue #33),unblocks reply-to-thread 加 CC 加附件存草稿 workflow。疊加 v2.9.0 task enforcement、v2.8.0 namespace、v2.7.0 NSQL confirmation、v2.6.0 thread index。
